name: codebase-navigator
description: Project-aware skills for backend codebase navigation, standards, commits, debugging, reviews, tests, and API workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Project-aware backend navigation, standards, commit, and debugging workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Codebase Navigator to route coding agents through focused project-aware skills for code lookup, index maintenance, standards management, safe commit preparation, API changes, root-cause debugging, code review, tests, and API documentation.
defaultPrompt: Help me understand this backend codebase.
Help me commit my code safely.
